ValidationRule.description: if other picklist value selected in payment terms then respective other Payemt Terms text fields shall not be blank
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(NOT($Permission.CONTAINER_Bypass_Validation_Rule), IF(AND(OR( RecordType.Name = 'Container GENSET Quote', RecordType.Name = 'Container NT Quote'), OR( ISPICKVAL(CONTAINER_Payment_Terms__c,'Other'), ISPICKVAL(CONTAINER_Payment_Terms_GENSET__c,'Other')), CONTAINER_Other_Payment_Terms__c == null), true, false))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Other Payment Terms Can Not be Blank.
